title: Uruguayan Steak Yakitori
description: A Japanese-inspired dish featuring grilled Uruguayan steak, served with a sweet soy sauce glaze and sesame seeds.
instructions: Season the Uruguayan steak with salt and black pepper.
Grill the steak for 4-5 minutes per side, or until it reaches your desired level of doneness.
Brush the steak with sesame oil during the last minute of grilling.
Let the steak rest for 5 minutes before slicing.
Meanwhile, heat the sweet soy sauce in a small saucepan over low heat.
Stir in toasted sesame seeds and cook for 1-2 minutes, or until the glaze has thickened.
Serve the sliced steak with sushi rice, Japanese pickled ginger, and green onions.
Drizzle the sweet soy sauce glaze over the top of the steak and garnish with additional sesame seeds if desired.
